title: SpectrumJEI
description: An addon to Spectrum that adds JEI support.
body:
SpectrumJEI is an addon to Spectrum that adds support for viewing recipes in Just Enough Items.

In addition to all REI/EMI features that Spectrum provides, this mod also adds:
• Separate categories for different Pedestal tiers
• Pedestal recipe transfer for Crafting Tablets (1.19.2+)
• Includes FractalJEI which fixes items not showing up in JEI (1.20.1+)

For EMI support, please directly use the base mod.

This mod supports being loaded with Sinytra Connector, requiring Connector Extras.
